query: OpenAI, Anthropic, and Mistral AI funding rounds announced or reported in June-July 2026, and any imminent/expected funding rounds in July 2026
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's the summary of what I found on OpenAI, Anthropic, and Mistral AI funding for June–July 2026:

**OpenAI** — No new equity round in June–July 2026. Its most recent round closed **March 31, 2026** ($122B at $852B post-money, the largest private round ever). June–July activity was IPO/debt-related: a confidential **S-1 filing on June 8, 2026** (IPO leaning to 2027, ~$1T target) and **SoftBank renewing ~$10B loan talks against its OpenAI stake (July 1, 2026)**.

**Anthropic** — No new round in June–July 2026. Its most recent was the **Series H announced May 28, 2026** ($65B at $965B post-money), making it the world's most valuable AI startup. Described as potentially its last private raise before an IPO.

**Mistral AI** — The **only company with an imminent/pending round**. Bloomberg reported on **June 12, 2026** that Mistral is in **early-stage talks to raise ~€3B (~$3.5B) at a ~€20B valuation**, nearly double its prior €11.7B. As of mid-July 2026, this round had not been confirmed as closed.

**Bottom line:** Of the three, only Mistral has an actively pending equity round as of July 14, 2026; OpenAI is focused on IPO prep and debt financing, and Anthropic just closed its massive Series H. Full structured data with all figures, dates, and sources has been recorded.

key_facts: OpenAI: No new equity funding round announced in June–July 2026; most recent round closed March 31, 2026 at $122B committed capital, $852B post-money valuation (largest private round in history).
OpenAI's March 31, 2026 round was co-led by SoftBank (with a16z, D.E. Shaw Ventures, MGX, TPG, T. Rowe Price); participation from Amazon ($50B), Nvidia ($30B), Microsoft; ~$3B from retail investors.
OpenAI filed a confidential draft S-1 with the SEC on June 8, 2026; IPO timing leaning toward 2027, ~$1T target valuation.
OpenAI (SoftBank) July 1, 2026: SoftBank renewed talks for a ~$10B loan against its OpenAI stake, following an earlier ~$40B bridge loan (reported April 30, 2026).
Anthropic: No new round in June–July 2026; most recent was Series H announced May 28, 2026 — $65B at $965B post-money valuation, world's most valuable AI startup.
Anthropic Series H co-led by Altimeter, Dragoneer, Greenoaks, Sequoia; with Capital Group, Coatue, D1, Baillie Gifford, Blackstone, Brookfield, D.E. Shaw.
Anthropic round cadence in 2026: Series G ($30B at $380B, Feb 12, 2026) then Series H ($65B at $965B, May 28, 2026); Series F was $13B at $183B (Sept 2025).

Mistral AI: On June 12, 2026 (Bloomberg), Mistral in EARLY-STAGE talks to raise ~€3B (~$3.5B) at ~€20B valuation (~$23.15B), nearly double its prior €11.7B valuation; not confirmed closed as of mid-July 2026.
Mistral prior context: Series C (~€2B, Sept 2025) at €11.7B post-money, ASML largest shareholder (~11%); plus $830M debt financing (March 2026) from seven banks.
As of July 14, 2026, Mistral has the only actively pending/imminent equity round among the three; OpenAI focused on IPO/debt; Anthropic just closed Series H.
